title: Türkiye launches anti dumping investigation on cold rolled stainless flat steel from China & Indonesia
bodyHtml:
An anti-dumping investigation has been initiated on "cold-rolled stainless flat steel products" classified under the customs tariff statistical positions 7219.31.00.00.00, 7219.32.10.00.00, 7219.32.90.00.00, 7219.33.10.00.00, 7219.33.90.00.00, 7219.34.10.00.00, 7219.34.90.00.00, 7219.35.10.00.00, 7219.35.90.00.00, 7220.20.21.00.11, 7220.20.21.00.12, 7220.20.29.00.11, 7220.20.29.00.12, 7220.20.41.00.11, 7220.20.41.00.12, 7220.20.49.00.11, 7220.20.49.00.12, 7220.20.81.00.11, 7220.20.81.00.12, 7220.20.89.00.11, 7220.20.89.00.12 originating from the People's Republic of China and the Republic of Indonesia.

Exporters, foreign producers, importers of the subject goods, professional organizations whose majority of members consist of these parties, the government of the exporting country, producers of similar goods in Turkey, and professional organizations whose majority of members consist of producers of similar goods in Turkey are considered interested parties in this investigation. Those who notify the competent authority within 37 days by responding to questionnaires or submitting their views will also be considered as interested parties in the investigation.

Click here for the Communiqué on the Prevention of Unfair Competition in Imports (No: 2024/20).
